text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! Your application has been approved and you've been assigned the Moderator role. We're glad to have you — feel free to introduce yourself!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an Event Helper. Looking forward to seeing you at our upcoming events!
Welcome, mentor_lina! Your application has been approved and you've joined us as a Mentor. We're excited to have your expertise in the community!
